source_note: CPUC Decision D.03-12-063 (adopted December 2003), Application A.02-12-028 — the Energy Resource Recovery Account (ERRA) reasonableness review for San Diego Gas & Electric Company's fuel and purchased-power costs. ERRA is California's annual fuel & purchased-power prudence determination. Listed for reference (metadata-only; the decision is published as HTML on the CPUC document portal). Source: CPUC (docs.cpuc.ca.gov/published/Final_decision/32806-01.htm).
